title: Lock third person
description:
Lock third person
This mod forces players to use only a third-person perspective.
body:
# Lock third person
This mod forces players to use only a third-person perspective.
The "Lock Third Person" mod forces players to use  only a third-person perspective, restricting them from switching to a first-person view. This enhances immersion by making players experience the game entirely from an external viewpoint, offering a different gameplay challenge.
